name: ACKPLN
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[ACKPLN] AS 
SELECT     AMBAR_KODU, STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, SUM(ACIK_MIKTAR) AS ACIK_MIKTAR
FROM         (SELECT     STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, ACIK_MIKTAR, AMBAR_KODU
                       FROM          dbo.ACKPLN_URUN WITH(NOLOCK)
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT     STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, ACIK_MIKTAR, AMBAR_KODU
                       FROM         dbo.ACKPLN_GRUPURUN WITH(NOLOCK)
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT     STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, ACIK_MIKTAR, AMBAR_KODU
                       FROM         dbo.ACKPLN_GRUPURUND WITH(NOLOCK)) AS LIST
GROUP BY STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, AMBAR_KODU
